name: usai-core
description: ZEN Vanguard professional AI literacy platform with guided curriculum, certifications, payments, and operational telemetry. The foundational program module for the U.S. AI Literacy initiative.

conflictsWithShell.react: Shell uses ^18.3.1 — upgrade shell to ^19 before integrating
conflictsWithShell.react-router-dom: Shell uses ^6.30.1 — upgrade shell to ^7 before integrating

integrationNotes: The AuthContext and BillingContext wrap all protected routes — wire up a provider at the program entry point.
All routes are defined in src/App.tsx — extract and mount under /program/usai-core/* in the Arsenal router.
The Express API server (server/) handles billing/status, Stripe webhooks, and admin bypass — deploy separately or merge into Arsenal API.
PREVIEW_ACCESS_ENABLED=true in DEV mode creates a local preview user without Supabase auth.
Build artifact target: V3-main/dist — served by serve-preview.cjs for static preview.
